title: Hormozi - Groundhog Day (Same 6 Months)
transcript: Most business owners don't change. They live the same six months of their lives a hundred times in a row. Then they die. So if you want to have a different outcome, you have to walk a different path. And so that's why we spent 200 plus hours analyzing companies in our portfolio. And we documented each of it into a single roadmap across 10 stages of growth. And so it looks like this. And if you want to stop groundhog day, it's the most viable thing that can possibly give you. And yes, it's free. You can grab a personalized copy by hitting the link and just plopping in your business information. And if you're a legitimate business owner who's looking to scale, we run workshops at our headquarters here in Las Vegas and you can book a call on the thank you page to see if it's good fit for you. We would look forward to meeting you potentially in person.

hook.text: Most business owners don't change. They live the same six months of their lives a hundred times in a row. Then they die.

sections.name: Hook - Mortality punch
sections.summary: Mismos 6 meses x100 y después mueren. Brutal.

sections.name: Bridge - Different path
sections.summary: Si querés un resultado diferente, caminá diferente

sections.name: Proof - 200 hours
sections.summary: Credibilidad con horas invertidas y 10 stages

structure.rehook_text: if you want to stop groundhog day

key_phrases: the same six months a hundred times in a row

cta.text: grab a personalized copy by hitting the link

analysis.emotional_arc: Shock existencial (vas a morir haciendo lo mismo) → urgencia de cambio → herramienta concreta → invitación
strengths: Hook devastador: 'then they die' es inolvidable
patterns_to_replicate: Hook MORTALIDAD: usar la muerte como wake-up call sin ser morboso
Metáfora cultural (Groundhog Day) como ancla para el problema
Filtro de identidad en CTA: 'legitimate business owner' hace que el viewer quiera calificar
